s: Daily Bing wallpapers for your home and lock screen
d:
Daily Wallpapers brings you a new Bing image of the day every day to personalize your device.

✨ Features:
• Daily automatic wallpaper updates
• Apply to home screen, lock screen, or both
• Save wallpapers to your gallery
• Mark your favorites
• View wallpaper history
• HD and mobile resolutions
• Material You design
• Dark mode support
• Available in English and Spanish

Set a beautiful new wallpaper every day automatically!
